core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API to replace the module removed from the JDK in Java 21.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for jakarta.annotation classes (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) which were available via the java.annotation module in JDK 8-11 but removed in JDK 21.

server/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API to replace the module removed from the JDK in Java 11+.
server/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for jakarta.annotation.* classes (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) which were previously available via the java.annotation module in Java 8 but removed in Java 11 and later.
